caption: A man with glasses and a tall, conical grey wig is seated in a studio setting, wearing a white button-down shirt with a red bowtie and tan suspenders. He wears large black headphones over his wig and is positioned in front of a professional black microphone. The background consists of a wall decorated with several framed photographs and clothing racks displaying shirts, including some with the brand "LEE" visible. On-screen graphics include a logo that reads "THE TALK JOY PODCAST" and additional text that says "TALK JOY". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a seated position, slightly shifting his head and facial expression as if speaking or listening. The camera angle remains steady, capturing him from the chest up, while the lighting and background remain constant across the frames.
